description_long: This is a single, vibrant pink rose with a long, slender green stem and several dark green leaves. The rose bloom is full and lush, with tightly layered petals forming a classic, rounded shape. The petals are arranged in a spiral pattern, overlapping each other and creating a dense, textured appearance. The stem is mostly straight but slightly curved, supporting the flower head at the top. A few leaves branch off from the stem, each with a smooth, ovate shape and a glossy surface. The overall appearance is elegant and natural, making it a common sight in urban parks, gardens, or as a decorative element in public spaces.
description: A lush pink rose with a long green stem and several dark green, ovate leaves. The bloom is full, with tightly layered, spiraled petals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rose bloom with its layered petals and two prominent leaves on the left side of the stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the stem and the rose bloom, with leaves clustered closer to the flower.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the rose bloom and a single leaf extending to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rose bloom and a single leaf on the left, with the stem slightly curved.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a spiral configuration, densely layered and overlapping, forming a rounded, symmetrical bloom typical of hybrid tea roses.
